sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29268" key="du/snomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσ-νομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lawless, unrighteous,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.316</biblScope> </bibl> (Nicodem.).</sense> </entryFree>
